title: MrBoriiz's Invisible Item Frames
description: This datapack allows you to make invisible item frames cheaply. Even though it is simple, easy and cheap to do, it is so useful!
body:
![MRBORIIZ'S INVISIBLE ITEM FRAMES LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Xkn4Fpl7/images/d707ee2194ab90430b848290031eef3319a8e0d1.png)


# [DISCONTINUED]


# ABOUT
This datapack allows you to make invisible itemframes cheaply. Even though it is simple, easy and cheap to do, it is so useful!

# HOW TO USE IT?
To use this, just insert a glass pane into the item frame or a glowing item frame and it will be invisible without losing the glass. But what to do to make it visible again? Just destroy it and put it back. It's that simple!
